title: mentha suaveolens var. craspedota
intro: Mentha suaveolens var. craspedota, also known as woolly mint or pineapple mint, is a variety of the mint plant that is native to Australia. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high concentration of menthol and other essential oils. The health benefits of Mentha suaveolens var. craspedota include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve headaches and fever, and soothe sore muscles. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
